title: erysimum ketenoglui
intro: Erysimum ketenoglui, also known as Erysimum cheiri, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, commonly referred to as a wallflower. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Erysimum ketenoglui include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Erysimum ketenoglui can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and other respiratory problems.
